Star on GitHub
Overview/Workflows

Workflows

Three reference workflows that demonstrate the full brief-to-publish pipeline.

Creator Short-Form

examples/creator_shortform/

Single creator, shoot-to-publish same day. Covers the fastest path from raw footage to published content across TikTok, Reels, and Shorts.

Steps

  1. 1Import footage + brief
  2. 2AI polish (upscale, caption, cleanup)
  3. 3Apply creator brand preset
  4. 4Export 9:16 for TikTok, Reels, Shorts
  5. 5QA check
  6. 6Publish handoff

Providers used

fal (video polish)
OpenAI (caption QA)

Agency Batch Campaign

examples/agency_batch_campaign/

Multi-asset batch generation for a campaign. Demonstrates provider routing across stills and video, brand preset enforcement, and multi-platform export.

Steps

  1. 1Parse campaign brief (5-20 assets)
  2. 2Route stills to Gemini/Imagen, video to fal
  3. 3Collect generated assets
  4. 4Apply agency brand preset
  5. 5Export all platform variants
  6. 6Run batch QA
  7. 7Generate campaign report

Providers used

fal (video generation)
Gemini (fast stills)
Imagen (hero stills)
OpenAI (batch QA)

Studio Same-Day Publish

examples/studio_same_day_publish/

Full end-to-end pipeline from a physical studio session. Covers the complete workflow from camera footage through AI enhancement, brand finishing, multi-platform export, and publish scheduling.

Steps

  1. 1Ingest studio footage + session brief
  2. 2AI enhancement (upscale, color, style)
  3. 3Generate supplementary stills
  4. 4Apply studio brand preset
  5. 5Export for all target platforms
  6. 6Full QA pass
  7. 7Schedule publish across platforms
  8. 8Write analytics to data plane

Providers used

fal (video, upscale, BG removal)
Gemini (supplementary stills)
OpenAI (QA, captioning)

Orchestration

n8n is the primary orchestration lane. No custom code needed for basic submit/poll/collect flows.

Mugc-mediaops-kit

Open-source finishing pipeline for agency UGC and generative media workflows.
